Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to create a set of open ended questions to ask an interviewee who just explained a complex property onboarding process The goal is to clarify details decision criteria roles timing exceptions etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First I need to break down each part of their explanation and think about what might be missing or needs more detail

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets take the first part where the property coordinator reviews documentation What if some documents are hard to get How do they handle delays Also what specific criteria make a document invalid or outdated

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Next when assigning a property manager the factors are workload geography experience and track record

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I should ask how these factors are weighed against each other For example if a manager is experienced but in a different region how is the decision made Also what happens if none of the managers meet the criteria

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The introductory call between manager and landlord is crucial

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Are there specific expectations or conditions that are always discussed How are conflicts resolved if there is a disagreement on policies Also how is the call documented and shared with relevant teams

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Scheduling a photographer and inspector how are they chosen Do they have preferred vendors

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What happens if the inspector finds issues How is the repair process managed Do they have a list of contractors they rely on

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Marketing and activation phase How does the digital marketing team use the photos What is the expected timeline from inspection to activation How do they handle discrepancies in market data affecting pricing

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Tenant screening process Who conducts the screenings the manager or a separate agent

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What are the criteria for selecting a tenant when multiple people apply How are promotional discounts handled and who approves them

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Quality checks and audits How are compliance issues addressed What if there is a conflict between the compliance officer and the financial analyst How often do these audits happen after activation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Communication and collaboration What tools do they use for tracking communications How is information shared between regional offices and support teams What happens if there is a breakdown in communication

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Exceptions For properties needing special insurance how is that flagged and processed Custom lease clauses how are they reviewed and approved

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to structure these into open ended questions making sure each part of the process is covered and the questions are clear and aimed at uncovering deeper details Also the questions should be categorized for clarity but presented as a list without markdown
